item.title: Wireguard: A Better VPN
item.description:
Virtual Private Networks (VPNs) keep your traffic private, but the older ones can feel heavy and slow. WireGuard fixes that and looks good doing it (the logo is great 😎).

It is tiny and modern, so it stays fast without hogging CPU or RAM. The crypto is up to date, so you get solid encryption without the vintage baggage of older protocols.
